item.title: How to Skip Podcast's Introduction
item.description:
I usually use Spotify to listen to podcasts, but because I use Spotify with my children, I want to find another Podcast App for my personal use.

And I find Pocket Casts has an interesting feature, it can skip the first or last *** seconds. It means some podcasts have an introduction at the beginning, if you want to skip it, you can do it in this app. (This feature is provided in the free version.)
